name: Set up a Facebook or Instagram Product Feed
body:
[{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaFacebookorInstagramProductFeed1.05T5g00000gQBTEEA4.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaFacebookorInstagramProductFeed1.05T5g00000gQBTEEA4.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration,"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know!"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": These steps replace the legacy Facebook Shop add-on, as it has limitations on mobile devices."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a Facebook account for your business "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://business.facebook.com/login/?next=https%3A%2F%2Fbusiness.facebook.com%2Foverview%2F", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": ". Once complete, follow the steps below to set up the feed from Neto."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This will create a Facebook catalogue, which can then be used to make "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://help.instagram.com/1108695469241257?ref=ig_shopping", "children": [{"text": "Instagram shopping posts"}]}, {"text": "."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Request a data service job"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install and set up the Add-on"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When you install the Facebook Catalogue add-on the export template will be created for you:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Marketplaces section find the "}, {"text": "Facebook Catalogue", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You'll be provided a Facebook Catalogue feed URL. Copy it"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.facebook.com/business/help/125074381480892?id=725943027795860", "children": [{"text": "steps provided by Facebook"}]}, {"text": " to set up the catalogue with your feed URL."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your product feed is now set up and ready for use by Facebook. In the sections below you'll find ways to customise your feed to send additional or dynamic information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Customise the Data Feed"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the add-on to view the export template. You can now edit the "}, {"text": "File Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " to replace product fields you don't want to use, with others you do."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, the condition "}, {"text": "new", "bold": true}, {"text": " is hard coded into the file body. If you sell used and /or refurbished products as well, you may want to create a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/26-add-and-manage-products#add-product-categories-to-products-via-import", "children": [{"text": "custom product field"}]}, {"text": " to store this data against your products, and export it to Facebook."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To replace a field, find the one you want to use in the "}, {"text": "Insert Data Tag", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down boxes. Then highlight the field you want to replace, and click the "}, {"text": "Insert Data Tag Button", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaFacebookorInstagramProductFeed2.05T5g00000gQBVyEAO.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaFacebookorInstagramProductFeed2.05T5g00000gQBVyEAO.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Other fields you may want to replace include:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Replacement"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Notes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[@brand@]", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[@upc@]", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Facebook requires only one of the different types of identifiers (brand, upc, ean, gtin, isbn). Be sure to change the file header column name to match."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[@store_price@]", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[@current_price_1@]", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will change the price in your file to your price A or promo price A (if in a promotion date range)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "in stock", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[@instock@]", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Change the hard coded "}, {"text": "in stock", "bold": true}, {"text": " value for each product to display out of stock products on Facebook. This will require a find and replace in template, explained below."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[@store_price@]", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""[%calc [@store_price@] * 1.1 /%]"", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Facebook requires all prices to include tax. This change will add 10% to your store price to account for GST, if your product prices don't include tax."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-cafae1e0"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Product Filters"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab. On this page you will see ways to exclude certain products from being included in the product file. We recommend that you only send "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": " products in the data file."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you have copied the "}, {"text": "File Body", "bold": true}, {"text": " code above, you will need to ensure that only products that are in stock are sent to Facebook. In the "}, {"text": "Store Quantity", "bold": true}, {"text": " filter, set the "}, {"text": "From", "bold": true}, {"text": " value to "}, {"text": "1", "code": true}, {"text": " to do this."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Find and Replace Data"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Find & Replace", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab. This page allows you to find certain data that is generated in the file, and replace it."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you use the "}, {"text": "[@in_stock@]", "bold": true}, {"text": " field to add out of stock products to the file, it will only output a "}, {"text": "y", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "n", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the file. Facebook won't read this correctly, so you need to configure find and replace functions to insert values Facebook can read."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add Find And Replace", "bold": true}, {"text": " button three times. Enter the values for each field as in the table below."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Replace"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exact Match"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Case Sensitive"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Template"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tag"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "n", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "out of stock", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "yes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "yes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Content Body Only"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "*Product Data >"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "			In Stock"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "y", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "in stock", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "yes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "yes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Content Body Only"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "*Product Data >"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "			In Stock"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": """}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": """"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "yes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "yes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Content Body Only"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-3af45201"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to the bottom of the page and click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Google Product Categories"}], "data-id": "5"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Google product categories are not required for all sellers, but can make your products easier to find."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To import Google product categories and assign them to your products follow the steps in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1066-import-google-shoppings-australian-product-categories", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now edit the template to include the Google product category. Add "}, {"text": ""google_product_category"", "code": true}, {"text": " to the end of the "}, {"text": "FILE HEADER", "bold": true}, {"text": " field of your template."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "FILE BODY - body", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, place your cursor at the end of the line and enter "}, {"text": ","", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "Insert Data Tag", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop-down menus, select "}, {"text": "Category Table (", "bold": true}, {"text": "Google Product Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": ")", "bold": true}, {"text": " and then "}, {"text": "Google Product Categories", "bold": true}, {"text": " Full Path List", "bold": true}, {"text": ". These names may be different if you set up the Google categories with an alternative name."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Insert", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and the data tag will be added to your template."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaFacebookorInstagramProductFeed3.05T5g00000gQBW8EAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaFacebookorInstagramProductFeed3.05T5g00000gQBW8EAO.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "After the Google category data tag enter "}, {"text": """, "code": true}, {"text": " to complete the format."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your product data feed to Facebook will now include the Google product category assigned to your products. You can now set up a Facebook shop by following the steps "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.facebook.com/business/help/268860861184453?id=1077620002609475", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively, connect it to Facebook Pixel. There are two parts to this process, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.facebook.com/business/help/125074381480892?id=725943027795860", "children": [{"text": "part 1"}]}, {"text": " and"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.facebook.com/business/help/1044262445604547?id=1913105122334058", "children": [{"text": "part 2"}]}, {"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ". "}]}]}]
